name: forge_audit_phantom_button
description: Scan rendered HTML for elements declaring a data-backend slug that isn't declared in backends.toml. Catches dead CTA buttons, broken form actions, and orphan-action elements. Use this instead of `grep -r 'data-backend' static/` — the substrate-native tool understands the typed backend registry. Per AVP-Doctrine rule sec-007.

explain.description: For each phantom button, name the file + line + suggested fix.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
